Class MailController

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/mails") @CrossOrigin(origins="http://localhost:5173") public class MailController extends Object
REST controller responsible for email management operations.

Provides endpoints for sending emails, synchronizing mailbox folders, retrieving messages and attachments, managing recipient suggestions, and moving messages between folders.

  • Constructor Details

    • MailController

      @Autowired public MailController(SendEmailService sendEmailService, MailService mailService, JwtService jwtService)
      Creates a new mail controller instance.
      Parameters:
      sendEmailService - service responsible for sending emails
      mailService - service responsible for email management operations
      jwtService - service used to extract user information from JWT tokens

  • Method Details

    • getUserIdFromHeader

      private Long getUserIdFromHeader(String bearerToken)
      Extracts the authenticated user's identifier from a JWT authorization header.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      Returns:
      identifier of the authenticated user

    • sendEmail

      @PostMapping("/send") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> sendEmail(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestParam String senders, @RequestParam String[] recipients, @RequestParam String subject, @RequestParam String text, @RequestParam String method, @RequestParam(required=false) org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile[] files, @RequestParam(required=false) String folderName, @RequestParam(required=false) Long parentMailId, @RequestParam(required=false) String actionType)
      Sends an email using one of the user's configured email accounts.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      senders - sender email address
      recipients - recipient email addresses
      subject - email subject
      text - email content
      method - email sending method
      files - optional email attachments
      folderName - optional folder name
      parentMailId - optional parent email identifier
      actionType - optional action type
      Returns:
      result of the email sending operation

    • fetchEmails

      @GetMapping("/fetch") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> fetchEmails(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestParam String accountEmail, @RequestParam(defaultValue="INBOX") String folder, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") int page, @RequestParam(defaultValue="20") int size, @RequestParam(required=false) String query)
      Retrieves emails from a selected mailbox folder.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      accountEmail - email account address
      folder - mailbox folder name
      page - requested page number
      size - number of emails per page
      query - optional search query
      Returns:
      paginated collection of email messages

    • syncEmails

      @PostMapping("/sync") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> syncEmails(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestParam String accountEmail, @RequestParam(defaultValue="INBOX") String folder)
      Synchronizes a mailbox folder with the remote IMAP server.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      accountEmail - email account address
      folder - mailbox folder to synchronize
      Returns:
      synchronization result

    • downloadFile

      @GetMapping("/{accountEmail}/{folder}/{uid}/attachments/{filename:.+}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<byte[]> downloadFile(@RequestHeader(value="Authorization",required=false) String bearerToken, @RequestParam(value="token",required=false) String queryToken, @PathVariable String accountEmail, @PathVariable String folder, @PathVariable long uid, @PathVariable String filename, @RequestParam(required=false,defaultValue="false") boolean download)
      Retrieves an attachment associated with an email message.

      The attachment can be displayed inline in the browser or downloaded as a file depending on the value of the download parameter.

      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token from the request header
      queryToken - JWT authorization token provided as a query parameter
      accountEmail - email account address
      folder - mailbox folder
      uid - unique message identifier
      filename - attachment filename
      download - determines whether the attachment should be downloaded
      Returns:
      attachment content

    • getEmailDetails

      @GetMapping("/{accountEmail}/{folder}/{uid}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<EmailMessage> getEmailDetails(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @PathVariable String accountEmail, @PathVariable String folder, @PathVariable long uid)
      Retrieves detailed information about a specific email message.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      accountEmail - email account address
      folder - mailbox folder
      uid - unique message identifier
      Returns:
      email details

    • getSuggestions

      @GetMapping("/suggestions") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<String>> getSuggestions(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestParam String senderEmail)
      Retrieves recipient suggestions associated with a specific sender address.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      senderEmail - sender email address
      Returns:
      list of suggested recipient addresses

    • getGlobalSuggestions

      @GetMapping("/suggestions/global") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<String>> getGlobalSuggestions(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken)
      Retrieves all recipient suggestions available to the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      Returns:
      list of suggested recipient addresses

    • addSuggestion

      @PostMapping("/suggestions/add") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> addSuggestion(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestBody Map<String,String> payload)
      Adds a recipient suggestion for future email composition.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      payload - request payload containing sender and recipient email addresses
      Returns:
      information about the created suggestion

    • deleteSuggestion

      @DeleteMapping("/suggestions/delete") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> deleteSuggestion(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestParam String senderEmail, @RequestParam String recipientEmail)
      Removes a stored recipient suggestion.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      senderEmail - sender email address
      recipientEmail - recipient email address
      Returns:
      operation result information

    • getUserEmailAccounts

      @GetMapping("/accounts") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<String>> getUserEmailAccounts(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken)
      Retrieves all email accounts configured by the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      Returns:
      list of configured email account addresses

    • moveMail

      @PostMapping("/move") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Object>> moveMail(@RequestHeader("Authorization") String bearerToken, @RequestBody MoveMailRequest request)
      Moves an email message from one folder to another.
      Parameters:
      bearerToken - JWT authorization token
      request - request containing message and folder information
      Returns:
      operation result information
